prayer.title: 🕐️ Morning Prayer
prayer.parsha_theme: blessing children, final words, lasting impact
prayer.modeh_ani: מודה אני לפניך — I gratefully thank You, living and eternal King, for returning my soul within me with compassion.
prayer.blessing: Blessed are You who crowns Israel with glory — let my work bring You honor.
prayer.psalm: **Psalm 121:8**: "The Lord will watch over your coming and going both now and forevermore."
prayer.proverb: **Proverbs 27:23**: "Know well the condition of your flocks, and give attention to your herds."
prayer.intention: Let today's small faithfulness lead to tomorrow's greater stewardship.
prayer.closing: May your work today be a pleasing offering. May your rest tonight be deep and restorative.
